The data frame has 22 columns, the feature columns is the binary values
which indicates the churn state of the customer. There are 6 character
columns, 15 Numeric columns, and a logical columns.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Summarize it as a dataframe and plot the bar graph }
\NormalTok{feature\_count.df }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{prop.table}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{table}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Attrition\_Flag)) }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{feature\_count.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#                Var1     Freq}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 1 Attrited Customer 16.06596}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 2 Existing Customer 83.93404}

\CommentTok{\# Set the column names }
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(feature\_count.df) }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Attrition\_Flag"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Count\_percentage"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Plot the percentage of the Attrition Flag}
\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(feature\_count.df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ Attrition\_Flag, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ Count\_percentage, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ Attrition\_Flag)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{stat =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_text}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(Count\_percentage, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)),}
            \AttributeTok{vjust =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Feature Distribution"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Attrition\_Flag"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Count\_percentage"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{panel.grid.major.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{())}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Factor the label column}\label{factor-the-label-column}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Factor the Attrition\_Flag}
\NormalTok{df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Attrition\_Flag }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Attrition\_Flag)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

The feature columns is imbalanced in the ratio of 15:58, so the feature
column is under sample or over sample before the model training.

From the columns details, Attrition\_Flag is the label to predict about
the churn of the bank and rest of the columns are the labels.

\subsection{Processing pipeline with the
recipe}\label{processing-pipeline-with-the-recipe}

\section{Split the data set as train test split for the preprocessing
and
EDA}\label{split-the-data-set-as-train-test-split-for-the-preprocessing-and-eda}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Set the seed }
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(seed\_value)}

\CommentTok{\# Split the dataset and store it in df.split using initial split method.}
\NormalTok{df.split }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{initial\_split}\NormalTok{(df, }\AttributeTok{prop =} \FloatTok{0.8}\NormalTok{)}


\CommentTok{\# Store the train data in df\_train and test data in df\_test }
\NormalTok{df\_train }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{training}\NormalTok{(df.split)}
\NormalTok{df\_test }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{testing}\NormalTok{(df.split)}


\CommentTok{\# Check train dataset }
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(df\_train) }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [1] "CLIENTNUM"                "Attrition\_Flag"          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [3] "Customer\_Age"             "Gender"                  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [5] "Dependent\_count"          "Education\_Level"         }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [7] "Marital\_Status"           "Income\_Category"         }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [9] "Card\_Category"            "Months\_on\_book"          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [11] "Total\_Relationship\_Count" "Months\_Inactive\_12\_mon"  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [13] "Contacts\_Count\_12\_mon"    "Credit\_Limit"            }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [15] "Total\_Revolving\_Bal"      "Avg\_Open\_To\_Buy"         }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [17] "Total\_Amt\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1"     "Total\_Trans\_Amt"         }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [19] "Total\_Trans\_Ct"           "Total\_Ct\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1"     }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [21] "Avg\_Utilization\_Ratio"    "X"}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\# Create a recipe with the train data set and store it in the variable

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Create a recipe and store it in a recipe.df with the feature column as Attrition\_Flag}
\NormalTok{recipe.df }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{recipe}\NormalTok{(Attrition\_Flag }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ ., }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ df\_train)}

\NormalTok{recipe.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Recipe {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Inputs}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Number of variables by role}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# outcome:    1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# predictor: 21}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Check the NA values in the entire dataset and plot it with
the box
plot}\label{check-the-na-values-in-the-entire-dataset-and-plot-it-with-the-box-plot}

\# Create a dataframe to calculate the NA values in each column \# Plot
the bar graphs for the NA data frame

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Calculate the NA values of each column in the df and store it in na.df }
\NormalTok{na.df }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{col =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(df), }
  \AttributeTok{na\_sum =} \FunctionTok{colSums}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(df))}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{na.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#                                               col na\_sum}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# CLIENTNUM                               CLIENTNUM      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Attrition\_Flag                     Attrition\_Flag      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Customer\_Age                         Customer\_Age      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Gender                                     Gender      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Dependent\_count                   Dependent\_count      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Education\_Level                   Education\_Level      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Marital\_Status                     Marital\_Status      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Income\_Category                   Income\_Category      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Card\_Category                       Card\_Category      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Months\_on\_book                     Months\_on\_book      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Relationship\_Count Total\_Relationship\_Count      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Months\_Inactive\_12\_mon     Months\_Inactive\_12\_mon      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Contacts\_Count\_12\_mon       Contacts\_Count\_12\_mon      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Credit\_Limit                         Credit\_Limit      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Revolving\_Bal           Total\_Revolving\_Bal      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Avg\_Open\_To\_Buy                   Avg\_Open\_To\_Buy      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Amt\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1         Total\_Amt\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Trans\_Amt                   Total\_Trans\_Amt      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Trans\_Ct                     Total\_Trans\_Ct      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Ct\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1           Total\_Ct\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Avg\_Utilization\_Ratio       Avg\_Utilization\_Ratio      0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# X                                               X  10127}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Bar plot to plot the sum of columns }
\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(na.df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ col, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ na\_sum)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{stat =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"steelblue"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_flip}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{ylab}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Sum of NA"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{xlab}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Columns with NA"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{panel.grid.major.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{())}

From the bar graph, there is only one column with more than 10K na
values, so remove the columns in the recipe.

\subsection{Remove the NA column}\label{remove-the-na-column}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Get the col to remove to store it in the col\_remove }
\NormalTok{col\_remove }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{  na.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
                \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(na\_sum }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
                \FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(col)}

\NormalTok{col\_remove}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [1] "X"}


\CommentTok{\# Update the column to removed na column in recipe as columns\_to\_remove }
\NormalTok{recipe.df }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ recipe.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
              \FunctionTok{update\_role}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(col\_remove), }\AttributeTok{new\_role =} \StringTok{"columns\_to\_remove"}\NormalTok{) }

\NormalTok{recipe.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Recipe {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Inputs}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Number of variables by role}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# outcome:            1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# predictor:         20}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# columns\_to\_remove:  1}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Check the outliers in the
dataset}\label{check-the-outliers-in-the-dataset}

\# Using IQR to find the outliers in each columns and store it in the
dataframe \# Plot the outliers

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Create a method as count\_outlier in each column using the IQR and return the dataframe }
\NormalTok{count\_outlier }\OtherTok{=} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Get the numeric column and store it in num\_cols}
\NormalTok{  num\_cols }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{sapply}\NormalTok{(df, is.numeric)}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Loop each columns in the dataframe using sapply }
  \CommentTok{\# Calculate the outliers of the each columns }
  \CommentTok{\# Store it in the ouliter.df }
\NormalTok{  outlier.df }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{column =} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df)[num\_cols],}
    \AttributeTok{n\_outliers =} \FunctionTok{sapply}\NormalTok{(df[, num\_cols], }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(col) \{}
\NormalTok{      q1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(col, }\FloatTok{0.25}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      q3  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(col, }\FloatTok{0.75}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      iqr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ q3 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ q1}
\NormalTok{      lower }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ q1 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FloatTok{1.5} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ iqr}
\NormalTok{      upper }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ q3 }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FloatTok{1.5} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ iqr}
      \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(col }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ lower }\SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ col }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ upper)}
\NormalTok{    \})}
\NormalTok{  )}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Return the dataframe }
  \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(outlier.df)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Invoke the method count\_outlier to get the outlier and store it in outlier.df}
\NormalTok{outlier.df }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{count\_outlier}\NormalTok{(df)}

\NormalTok{outlier.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#                                            column n\_outliers}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# CLIENTNUM                               CLIENTNUM          0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Customer\_Age                         Customer\_Age          2}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Dependent\_count                   Dependent\_count          0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Months\_on\_book                     Months\_on\_book        386}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Relationship\_Count Total\_Relationship\_Count          0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Months\_Inactive\_12\_mon     Months\_Inactive\_12\_mon        331}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Contacts\_Count\_12\_mon       Contacts\_Count\_12\_mon        629}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Credit\_Limit                         Credit\_Limit        984}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Revolving\_Bal           Total\_Revolving\_Bal          0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Avg\_Open\_To\_Buy                   Avg\_Open\_To\_Buy        963}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Amt\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1         Total\_Amt\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1        396}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Trans\_Amt                   Total\_Trans\_Amt        896}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Trans\_Ct                     Total\_Trans\_Ct          2}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Total\_Ct\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1           Total\_Ct\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1        394}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Avg\_Utilization\_Ratio       Avg\_Utilization\_Ratio          0}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Plot the bar graphs}\label{plot-the-bar-graphs}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Plot the point graphs to plot the count of the ouliers in the each columns }
\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(outlier.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(n\_outliers }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ column, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ n\_outliers)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{stat =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"steelblue"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Distribution of outlier counts (per feature)"}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Outlier count per feature"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Number of features"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{angle=}\DecValTok{45}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{BankingChurn_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-14-1.pdf}}

\section{Separate the columns with the outliers and winsorized it to
remove the
outliers}\label{separate-the-columns-with-the-outliers-and-winsorized-it-to-remove-the-outliers}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Get the columns with the outliers }
\NormalTok{outliers\_cols }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ outlier.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
                  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(n\_outliers }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
                  \FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(column)}

\NormalTok{outliers\_cols}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [1] "Customer\_Age"           "Months\_on\_book"         "Months\_Inactive\_12\_mon"}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [4] "Contacts\_Count\_12\_mon"  "Credit\_Limit"           "Avg\_Open\_To\_Buy"       }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  [7] "Total\_Amt\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1"   "Total\_Trans\_Amt"        "Total\_Trans\_Ct"        }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [10] "Total\_Ct\_Chng\_Q4\_Q1"}


\NormalTok{recipe.df }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ recipe.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \CommentTok{\# winsorize only the outlier columns}
  \FunctionTok{step\_hai\_winsorized\_truncate}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    outliers\_cols,}
    \AttributeTok{fraction =} \FloatTok{0.05}
\NormalTok{  )}
  

\NormalTok{recipe.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Recipe {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Inputs}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Number of variables by role}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# outcome:            1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# predictor:         20}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# columns\_to\_remove:  1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Operations}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Winsorized Truncation Transformation on: outliers\_cols}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Check the Scale of the numerical
columns}\label{check-the-scale-of-the-numerical-columns}

\# Get the numerical columns \# Check the scale using the SD method

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Get the numerical columns and store it in df\_num}
\NormalTok{df\_num }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{select\_if}\NormalTok{(is.numeric)}

\CommentTok{\# Create a dataframe with the sd range }
\NormalTok{df\_sd\_range }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
                \AttributeTok{Features =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(df\_num),            }
                \AttributeTok{SD =} \FunctionTok{sapply}\NormalTok{(df\_num, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
                \AttributeTok{Mean =} \FunctionTok{sapply}\NormalTok{(df\_num, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{                ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
                \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{( }
                  \AttributeTok{Range =} \FunctionTok{log10}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(Mean }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ SD) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FloatTok{1e{-}12}\NormalTok{), }
\NormalTok{                  )}

\CommentTok{\# Plot the bar graphs to plot }
\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(df\_sd\_range, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ Features, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ Range)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{stat =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"steelblue"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Distribution of Scale (per feature)"}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Scale values per feature"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Number of features"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{angle=}\DecValTok{45}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{BankingChurn_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-16-1.pdf}}

\subsection{There are 4 characters column need to processed
(Card\_Category, Income\_Category, Marital\_Status \&
Education\_Level).}\label{there-are-4-characters-column-need-to-processed-card_category-income_category-marital_status-education_level.}

\# Check the Unique values in the each column \# Try to minimize the
values and combine the values with same semantic meanings. \# Encode the
values with the recipe

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Create a vectors of the columns names as char\_cols }
\NormalTok{char\_cols }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Card\_Category"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Income\_Category"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Marital\_Status"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Education\_Level"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Gender"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# create a function to check the unique values in each of the columns and print the dataframe with the columns names }
\NormalTok{check\_unique }\OtherTok{=} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df ,vec)\{}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Loop the vector }
  \CommentTok{\# Get the unique values and store it in col.unique}
  \CommentTok{\# Create a dataframe with vector and unique values }
  \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{col =}\NormalTok{ vec,}
    \AttributeTok{unique\_values =} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(df[vec], unique)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{unique\_values =} \FunctionTok{map\_chr}\NormalTok{(unique\_values, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(.x, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{))))}
\NormalTok{\}}


\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{check\_unique}\NormalTok{(df, char\_cols))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# \# A tibble: 5 x 2}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   col             unique\_values                                                 }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}           \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                                                         }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 1 Card\_Category   Blue, Gold, Silver, Platinum                                  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 2 Income\_Category $60K {-} $80K, Less than $40K, $80K {-} $120K, $40K {-} $60K, $120K\textasciitilde{}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 3 Marital\_Status  Married, Single, Unknown, Divorced                            }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 4 Education\_Level High School, Graduate, Uneducated, Unknown, College, Post{-}Gra\textasciitilde{}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 5 Gender          M, F}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{The Card\_Category cannot be imputed, since those values are
semantically different. The Gender has only M and F are semantically
differnt.}\label{the-card_category-cannot-be-imputed-since-those-values-are-semantically-different.-the-gender-has-only-m-and-f-are-semantically-differnt.}

\section{The Income\_Category states in different ranges can be
converted into Less than 40K, more than 120K, \& Average Between 40K to
120K.}\label{the-income_category-states-in-different-ranges-can-be-converted-into-less-than-40k-more-than-120k-average-between-40k-to-120k.}

\section{The Marital\_Status classify into 4 categories with 3 having
the same semantic values, they are merged into 2 categories Married and
Single.}\label{the-marital_status-classify-into-4-categories-with-3-having-the-same-semantic-values-they-are-merged-into-2-categories-married-and-single.}

\section{The Education\_Level classified into 7 categories with 5 having
the same semantic meaning, they are merged into 2 categories as Educated
and
Uneducated.}\label{the-education_level-classified-into-7-categories-with-5-having-the-same-semantic-meaning-they-are-merged-into-2-categories-as-educated-and-uneducated.}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{recipe.df }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ recipe.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
              \CommentTok{\# mark unseen categories when new data arrives}
              \FunctionTok{step\_novel}\NormalTok{(Income\_Category) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
              \CommentTok{\# Merge the Income\_Category into Less than 40K, more than 120K, \& Average Between 40K to 120K}
              \FunctionTok{step\_mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Income\_Category =} \FunctionTok{fct\_collapse}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                Income\_Category, }
                \StringTok{"Less than 40K"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Less than $40K"}\NormalTok{,}
                \StringTok{"More than 120K"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"$120K +"}\NormalTok{,}
                \StringTok{"Average Between 40K to 120K"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
                  \StringTok{"$40K {-} $60K"}\NormalTok{,}
                  \StringTok{"$60K {-} $80K"}\NormalTok{,}
                  \StringTok{"$80K {-} $120K"}\NormalTok{, }
                  \StringTok{"Unknown"}
\NormalTok{                )}
\NormalTok{              )}
\NormalTok{            ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
            \CommentTok{\# mark unseen categories when new data arrives}
            \FunctionTok{step\_novel}\NormalTok{(Marital\_Status) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
            \CommentTok{\# Merge the Marital\_Status into Married and Single}
            \FunctionTok{step\_mutate}\NormalTok{(}
              \AttributeTok{Marital\_Status =} \FunctionTok{fct\_collapse}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                Marital\_Status,}
                \AttributeTok{Married =} \StringTok{"Married"}\NormalTok{,}
                \AttributeTok{Single  =} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}
                  \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(Marital\_Status),}
                  \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Single"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Unknown"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Divorced"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{                )}
\NormalTok{              )}
\NormalTok{            ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
            \CommentTok{\# mark unseen categories when new data arrives}
            \FunctionTok{step\_novel}\NormalTok{(Education\_Level) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
            \CommentTok{\# Merge the Education\_Level into Educated and Uneducated}
            \FunctionTok{step\_mutate}\NormalTok{(}
              \AttributeTok{Education\_Level =} \FunctionTok{fct\_collapse}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                Education\_Level, }
                  \AttributeTok{Uneducated =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
                    \StringTok{"Uneducated"}\NormalTok{, }
                    \StringTok{"Unknown"}
\NormalTok{                    ),}
                  \AttributeTok{Educated =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
                    \StringTok{"High School"}\NormalTok{, }
                    \StringTok{"Graduate"}\NormalTok{, }
                    \StringTok{"College"}\NormalTok{, }
                    \StringTok{"Post{-}Graduate"}\NormalTok{, }
                    \StringTok{"Doctorate"}
\NormalTok{                  )}
\NormalTok{                )}
\NormalTok{              )}
            
\NormalTok{recipe.df            }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Recipe {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Inputs}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Number of variables by role}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# outcome:            1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# predictor:         20}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# columns\_to\_remove:  1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Operations}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Winsorized Truncation Transformation on: outliers\_cols}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Centering and scaling for: all\_numeric\_predictors()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Income\_Category}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Income\_Category, \textasciigrave{}Less than 40K\textasciigrave{} = "Less}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   than $40K", \textasciigrave{}More than 120K\textasciigrave{} = "$120K +", \textasciigrave{}Average Between 40K to 120K\textasciigrave{} =}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   c("$40K {-} $60K", "$60K {-} $80K", "$80K {-} $120K", "Unknown"))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Marital\_Status}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Marital\_Status, Married = "Married",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   Single = intersect(levels(Marital\_Status), c("Single", "Unknown",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   "Divorced")))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Education\_Level}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Education\_Level, Uneducated =}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   c("Uneducated", "Unknown"), Educated = c("High School", "Graduate",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   "College", "Post{-}Graduate", "Doctorate"))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Encode all the above categorial variables with one-hot
encoding.}\label{encode-all-the-above-categorial-variables-with-one-hot-encoding.}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Categorical values }
\NormalTok{char\_cols}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [1] "Card\_Category"   "Income\_Category" "Marital\_Status"  "Education\_Level"}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# [5] "Gender"}

\NormalTok{recipe.df }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ recipe.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
              \CommentTok{\# One{-}hot encode using dummy method for all the character columns }
              \FunctionTok{step\_dummy}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{                char\_cols, }
                \AttributeTok{one\_hot =} \ConstantTok{TRUE} 
\NormalTok{              )}

\NormalTok{recipe.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Recipe {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Inputs}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Number of variables by role}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# outcome:            1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# predictor:         20}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# columns\_to\_remove:  1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Operations}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Winsorized Truncation Transformation on: outliers\_cols}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Centering and scaling for: all\_numeric\_predictors()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Income\_Category}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Income\_Category, \textasciigrave{}Less than 40K\textasciigrave{} = "Less}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   than $40K", \textasciigrave{}More than 120K\textasciigrave{} = "$120K +", \textasciigrave{}Average Between 40K to 120K\textasciigrave{} =}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   c("$40K {-} $60K", "$60K {-} $80K", "$80K {-} $120K", "Unknown"))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Marital\_Status}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Marital\_Status, Married = "Married",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   Single = intersect(levels(Marital\_Status), c("Single", "Unknown",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   "Divorced")))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Education\_Level}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Education\_Level, Uneducated =}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   c("Uneducated", "Unknown"), Educated = c("High School", "Graduate",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   "College", "Post{-}Graduate", "Doctorate"))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Dummy variables from: char\_cols}

    \AttributeTok{cols =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{var1,}
    \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"var2"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"correlation"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Plot the correlation between the variables as heat map }
\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(corr\_long, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(var1, var2, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ correlation)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_tile}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}

    \AttributeTok{midpoint =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{angle =} \DecValTok{45}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"Correlation"}\NormalTok{)}

\subsection{The feature column is so unbalanced in the ratio of 15:85.
To balance this, use the oversampleing SMOTE
techinique.}\label{the-feature-column-is-so-unbalanced-in-the-ratio-of-1585.-to-balance-this-use-the-oversampleing-smote-techinique.}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{recipe.df }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ recipe.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
              \CommentTok{\# Oversample the data using SMOTE technique }
              \FunctionTok{step\_smote}\NormalTok{(Attrition\_Flag)}

\NormalTok{recipe.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Recipe {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Inputs}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Number of variables by role}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# outcome:            1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# predictor:         20}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# columns\_to\_remove:  1}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Operations}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Winsorized Truncation Transformation on: outliers\_cols}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Centering and scaling for: all\_numeric\_predictors()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Income\_Category}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Income\_Category, \textasciigrave{}Less than 40K\textasciigrave{} = "Less}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   than $40K", \textasciigrave{}More than 120K\textasciigrave{} = "$120K +", \textasciigrave{}Average Between 40K to 120K\textasciigrave{} =}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   c("$40K {-} $60K", "$60K {-} $80K", "$80K {-} $120K", "Unknown"))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Marital\_Status}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Marital\_Status, Married = "Married",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   Single = intersect(levels(Marital\_Status), c("Single", "Unknown",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   "Divorced")))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Novel factor level assignment for: Education\_Level}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Variable mutation for: fct\_collapse(Education\_Level, Uneducated =}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   c("Uneducated", "Unknown"), Educated = c("High School", "Graduate",}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   "College", "Post{-}Graduate", "Doctorate"))}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * Dummy variables from: char\_cols}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * SMOTE based on: Attrition\_Flag}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Basic EDA and preprocessing are done with handled the
missing values, checked the outliers in the numerical features and
handled it, check the scales and normalized it, check the individual
categorial values, handled the semantic relations by featured and
encoded it, handled the imbalance by using
SMOT.}\label{basic-eda-and-preprocessing-are-done-with-handled-the-missing-values-checked-the-outliers-in-the-numerical-features-and-handled-it-check-the-scales-and-normalized-it-check-the-individual-categorial-values-handled-the-semantic-relations-by-featured-and-encoded-it-handled-the-imbalance-by-using-smot.}

\subsection{Prepare the recipe}\label{prepare-the-recipe}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{recipe.df\_prep }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{prep}\NormalTok{(recipe.df)}

\subsection{Modelling and Validations}\label{modelling-and-validations}

\subsection{K-fold cross validation}\label{k-fold-cross-validation}

\# Split the train data into k-fold to validate and train the model

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# set the seed }
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(seed\_value)}

\CommentTok{\# Create the k{-}fold using vfold\_cv() and store it in k.fold }
\NormalTok{k.fold }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{vfold\_cv}\NormalTok{(df\_train, }\AttributeTok{v =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{strata =} \StringTok{"Attrition\_Flag"}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(k.fold)}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  splits.Length  splits.Class  splits.Mode      id           }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list           Length:5          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list           Class :character  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list           Mode  :character  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list                             }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Model Architecture}\label{model-architecture}

\# Create a XGBoost Model Architecture \# Create and fit the workflow \#
Create an hyperparameter and tune it \# Collect the metrics \# Get the
best parameter \# Fit the parameter with the model and create a
finalized model

\subsection{Create an architecture for the XGBoost
algorithm}\label{create-an-architecture-for-the-xgboost-algorithm}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Create the XGBoost model and store it in xgboost.model }
\NormalTok{xgboost.model }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{boost\_tree}\NormalTok{(}
  \CommentTok{\# Number of trees }
  \AttributeTok{trees =} \FunctionTok{tune}\NormalTok{(), }
  \CommentTok{\# learning rate }
  \AttributeTok{learn\_rate =} \FunctionTok{tune}\NormalTok{(),}
  \CommentTok{\# depth of tree}
  \AttributeTok{tree\_depth =} \FunctionTok{tune}\NormalTok{(), }
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \CommentTok{\# Set the mode as classification}
  \FunctionTok{set\_mode}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"classification"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \CommentTok{\# Set the engine as xgboost}
  \FunctionTok{set\_engine}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"xgboost"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{tree\_method =} \StringTok{"hist"}\NormalTok{, }
    \AttributeTok{device =} \StringTok{"cuda"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{max\_bin     =} \DecValTok{64}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{nthread     =} \DecValTok{10}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(xgboost.model)  }

\DocumentationTok{\#\# eng\_args              4      quosures list     }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# mode                  1      {-}none{-}   character}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# user\_specified\_mode   1      {-}none{-}   logical  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# method                0      {-}none{-}   NULL     }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# engine                1      {-}none{-}   character}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# user\_specified\_engine 1      {-}none{-}   logical}

\subsection{Create a workflow for the model and set the recipe and model
to
it}\label{create-a-workflow-for-the-model-and-set-the-recipe-and-model-to-it}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Create a workflow using workflow() and assign it to model.workflow }
\NormalTok{model.workflow }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{workflow}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
                  \CommentTok{\# Add the recipe }
                  \FunctionTok{add\_recipe}\NormalTok{(recipe.df) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
                  \CommentTok{\# Add the model }
                  \FunctionTok{add\_model}\NormalTok{(xgboost.model)}

\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(model.workflow)}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#         Length Class      Mode   }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# pre     3      stage\_pre  list   }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# fit     2      stage\_fit  list   }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# post    2      stage\_post list   }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# trained 1      {-}none{-}     logical}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Create a grid parameter for the Bayesian
SearchCV}\label{create-a-grid-parameter-for-the-bayesian-searchcv}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Create a grid using extract\_parameter\_set\_dials() and store it in model.grid }
\NormalTok{model.grid }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{extract\_parameter\_set\_dials}\NormalTok{(model.workflow) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
              \CommentTok{\# update the tune grid parameters }
              \FunctionTok{update}\NormalTok{(}
                \CommentTok{\# Number of trees }
                \AttributeTok{trees =} \FunctionTok{trees}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{range =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{500}\NormalTok{)),}
                \CommentTok{\# learning rate}
                \AttributeTok{learn\_rate =} \FunctionTok{learn\_rate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{range =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.0001}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.1}\NormalTok{)), }
                \CommentTok{\# Tree depth }
                \AttributeTok{tree\_depth =} \FunctionTok{tree\_depth}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{range =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{              )}

\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(model.grid)}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#      name                id               source           component        }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  Length:3           Length:3           Length:3           Length:3          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  Class :character   Class :character   Class :character   Class :character  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  Mode  :character   Mode  :character   Mode  :character   Mode  :character  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  component\_id       object.Length  object.Class  object.Mode}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  Length:3           6            quant\_param  list          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  Class :character   6            quant\_param  list          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  Mode  :character   6            quant\_param  list}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Create a Bayesian search CV and tune
it}\label{create-a-bayesian-search-cv-and-tune-it}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Set the seed }
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(seed\_value)}

\CommentTok{\# Create a inital grid and store it in inital.grid}
\NormalTok{initial.grid }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{tune\_grid}\NormalTok{(}
    \CommentTok{\# workflow }
    \AttributeTok{object =}\NormalTok{ model.workflow, }
    \CommentTok{\# folds }
    \AttributeTok{resamples =}\NormalTok{ k.fold, }
    \CommentTok{\# Number of grids }
    \AttributeTok{grid =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}
    \CommentTok{\# param }
    \AttributeTok{param\_info =}\NormalTok{ model.grid,}
    \CommentTok{\# Metrics }
    \AttributeTok{metrics =} \FunctionTok{metric\_set}\NormalTok{(roc\_auc, ppv, npv, accuracy)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(initial.grid)}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  splits.Length  splits.Class  splits.Mode      id           }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list           Length:5          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list           Class :character  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list           Mode  :character  }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list                             }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4            vfold\_split  list                             }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  .metrics.Length  .metrics.Class  .metrics.Mode}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  7       tbl\_df  list                          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  7       tbl\_df  list                          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  7       tbl\_df  list                          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  7       tbl\_df  list                          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  7       tbl\_df  list                          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  .notes.Length  .notes.Class  .notes.Mode}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4       tbl\_df  list                    }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4       tbl\_df  list                    }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4       tbl\_df  list                    }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4       tbl\_df  list                    }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4       tbl\_df  list}

\CommentTok{\# Create a Bayesian Grid CV and store it in bayesian.cv}
\NormalTok{bayesian.cv }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{tune\_bayes}\NormalTok{(}
  \CommentTok{\# workflow}
\NormalTok{  model.workflow, }
  \CommentTok{\# set the fold }
  \AttributeTok{resamples =}\NormalTok{ k.fold, }
  \CommentTok{\# parameters to tune  }
  \AttributeTok{param\_info =}\NormalTok{ model.grid, }
  \CommentTok{\# tuned grid }
  \AttributeTok{initial =}\NormalTok{ initial.grid,}
  \CommentTok{\# Number of iterations }
  \AttributeTok{iter =} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }
  \CommentTok{\# metrics }
  \AttributeTok{metrics =} \FunctionTok{metric\_set}\NormalTok{(roc\_auc, ppv, npv, accuracy)}
\NormalTok{)}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# ! No improvement for 10 iterations; returning current results.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Select the best parameter from the
cv}\label{select-the-best-parameter-from-the-cv}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Get the best parameter from the for the f\_meas and store it in best.parameters }
\NormalTok{best.parameters }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ bayesian.cv }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
                    \FunctionTok{select\_best}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{metric =} \StringTok{"roc\_auc"}\NormalTok{)  }

\NormalTok{best.parameters}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# \# A tibble: 1 x 4}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   trees tree\_depth learn\_rate .config         }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   \textless{}int\textgreater{}      \textless{}int\textgreater{}      \textless{}dbl\textgreater{} \textless{}chr\textgreater{}           }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 1   100          4       1.11 pre0\_mod01\_post0}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Get the metrics of the best
parameter}\label{get-the-metrics-of-the-best-parameter}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Extract the metrics of the best parameter and store it best.parameters\_metrics}
\NormalTok{best.parameters\_metrics }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ best.parameters }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(.config }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ best.parameters}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{.config)}

\NormalTok{best.parameters\_metrics}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# \# A tibble: 1 x 4}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   trees tree\_depth learn\_rate .config         }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   \textless{}int\textgreater{}      \textless{}int\textgreater{}      \textless{}dbl\textgreater{} \textless{}chr\textgreater{}           }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 1   100          4       1.11 pre0\_mod01\_post0}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Fit the best parameter to finalize the workflow
model}\label{fit-the-best-parameter-to-finalize-the-workflow-model}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Fit the best parameter to get the best model and store it in final\_model}
\NormalTok{final\_model }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ model.workflow }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
        \FunctionTok{finalize\_workflow}\NormalTok{(best.parameters\_metrics)}

\NormalTok{final\_model}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# == Workflow ====================================================================}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Preprocessor: Recipe}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Model: boost\_tree()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Preprocessor {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 10 Recipe Steps}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }

\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Model {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Boosted Tree Model Specification (classification)}

\subsection{Model Testing and
evaluations}\label{model-testing-and-evaluations}

\# last fit the model and get the scores of the model \# Plot the
confusion matrix for the model valuation \# Plot the metrics \# Extract
the best workflow and save it

\section{Last fit the model and obtain the score of the final
model}\label{last-fit-the-model-and-obtain-the-score-of-the-final-model}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Fit the best model with the trained data to get the best model and store it in final\_fitted\_model\_dt}
\NormalTok{final\_fitted\_model\_dt }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ final\_model }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
                \FunctionTok{last\_fit}\NormalTok{(df.split, }
                         \AttributeTok{metrics =} \FunctionTok{metric\_set}\NormalTok{(accuracy, bal\_accuracy, roc\_auc, ppv, npv, f\_meas, sens, spec, mcc))}


\CommentTok{\# Collect the metrics }
\NormalTok{collected\_metrics }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{collect\_metrics}\NormalTok{(final\_fitted\_model\_dt)}

\NormalTok{collected\_metrics}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# \# A tibble: 9 x 4}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   .metric      .estimator .estimate .config        }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   \textless{}chr\textgreater{}        \textless{}chr\textgreater{}          \textless{}dbl\textgreater{} \textless{}chr\textgreater{}          }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 1 accuracy     binary         0.969 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 2 bal\_accuracy binary         0.932 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 3 ppv          binary         0.921 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 4 npv          binary         0.977 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 5 f\_meas       binary         0.899 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 6 sens         binary         0.878 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 7 spec         binary         0.986 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 8 mcc          binary         0.881 pre0\_mod0\_post0}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 9 roc\_auc      binary         0.991 pre0\_mod0\_post0}

\end{Shaded}

\section{Plot the metrics of the
model}\label{plot-the-metrics-of-the-model}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Create a dataframe to store the metrics and estimates to plot it. Store it in metrics.df }
\NormalTok{metrics.df }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{metrics =}\NormalTok{ collected\_metrics}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{.metric, }
  \AttributeTok{values =}\NormalTok{ collected\_metrics}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{.estimate}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{metrics.df}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#        metrics    values}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 1     accuracy 0.9689042}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 2 bal\_accuracy 0.9318416}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 3          ppv 0.9210526}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 4          npv 0.9773519}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 5       f\_meas 0.8988764}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 6         sens 0.8777429}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 7         spec 0.9859402}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 8          mcc 0.8808728}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 9      roc\_auc 0.9913100}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Plot the metrics }
\NormalTok{metrics.df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =} \FunctionTok{reorder}\NormalTok{(metrics, values), }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ values)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_col}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_flip}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Model Performance Metrics"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Metrics"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Scores"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{theme\_minimal}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{BankingChurn_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-36-1.pdf}}

\section{Plot the confusion matrics of the model evaluation
data}\label{plot-the-confusion-matrics-of-the-model-evaluation-data}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Collect the prediction data from the last fit model and store it in pred.data }
\NormalTok{pred.data }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ final\_fitted\_model\_dt }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
              \FunctionTok{collect\_predictions}\NormalTok{()}

\CommentTok{\# Create a confusion matrix and store the values in confusion.matrix}
\NormalTok{confusion.matrix }\OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ pred.data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
                    \FunctionTok{conf\_mat}\NormalTok{(}
                      \AttributeTok{truth =}\NormalTok{ Attrition\_Flag, }
                      \AttributeTok{estimate =}\NormalTok{ .pred\_class}
\NormalTok{                      )}

\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(confusion.matrix)}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# \# A tibble: 13 x 3}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#    .metric              .estimator .estimate}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#    \textless{}chr\textgreater{}                \textless{}chr\textgreater{}          \textless{}dbl\textgreater{}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  1 accuracy             binary         0.969}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  2 kap                  binary         0.881}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  3 sens                 binary         0.878}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  4 spec                 binary         0.986}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  5 ppv                  binary         0.921}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  6 npv                  binary         0.977}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  7 mcc                  binary         0.881}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  8 j\_index              binary         0.864}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#  9 bal\_accuracy         binary         0.932}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 10 detection\_prevalence binary         0.150}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 11 precision            binary         0.921}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 12 recall               binary         0.878}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 13 f\_meas               binary         0.899}

\CommentTok{\# auto plot the confusion matrix }
\FunctionTok{autoplot}\NormalTok{(confusion.matrix, }\AttributeTok{type =} \StringTok{"heatmap"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Confusion Matrix"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{BankingChurn_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-37-1.pdf}}

\section{Extract the workflow and save the
workflow}\label{extract-the-workflow-and-save-the-workflow}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Extract the workflow using extract\_workflow() and store it in finalized\_model}
\NormalTok{finalized\_model }\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{extract\_workflow}\NormalTok{(final\_fitted\_model\_dt)}

\NormalTok{finalized\_model}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# == Workflow [trained] ==========================================================}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Preprocessor: Recipe}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Model: boost\_tree()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Preprocessor {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# 10 Recipe Steps}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_hai\_winsorized\_truncate()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_normalize()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_novel()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_mutate()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_novel()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_mutate()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_novel()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_mutate()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_dummy()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# * step\_smote()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# {-}{-} Model {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# \#\#\#\#\# xgb.Booster}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# raw: 142.5 Kb }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# call:}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   xgboost::xgb.train(params = list(eta = 1.10789856537429, max\_depth = 4L, }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#     gamma = 0, colsample\_bytree = 1, colsample\_bynode = 1, min\_child\_weight = 1, }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#     subsample = 1), data = x$data, nrounds = 100L, watchlist = x$watchlist, }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#     verbose = 0, tree\_method = "hist", device = "cuda", max\_bin = 64, }
\DocumentationTok{\#\#     nthread = 10, objective = "binary:logistic")}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# params (as set within xgb.train):}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   eta = "1.10789856537429", max\_depth = "4", gamma = "0", colsample\_bytree = "1", colsample\_bynode = "1", min\_child\_weight = "1", subsample = "1", tree\_method = "hist", device = "cuda", max\_bin = "64", nthread = "10", objective = "binary:logistic", validate\_parameters = "TRUE"}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# xgb.attributes:}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   niter}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# callbacks:}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#   cb.evaluation.log()}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# \# of features: 41 }

\DocumentationTok{\#\# nfeatures : 41 }
\DocumentationTok{\#\# evaluation\_log:}

\DocumentationTok{\#\#    {-}{-}{-}              {-}{-}{-}}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#     99      0.001356150}
\DocumentationTok{\#\#    100      0.001339515}

\CommentTok{\# Save the model workflow as the rds file }
\NormalTok{model\_file.path }\OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"D:/VS\_Codes/DataScience/Projects/Banking\_Customer\_Churn/r\_xgb"}
\FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(finalized\_model, }\AttributeTok{file =} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(model\_file.path, }\StringTok{"final\_model.rds"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
